seo.title: Tailor Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your tailoring business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Tailoring and Alterations

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Tailoring and Alterations
hero.subheading: Fits are personal. ReviewFlo asks after fittings when the mirror finally feels right.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Tailor Faces

items.heading: A perfect hem feels like “fixed,” not “wow”
items.body: Customers forget the panic they arrived with.

items.heading: Wedding timelines amplify stress
items.body: One late stitch becomes a public story.

items.heading: Pins and fittings need focus, not marketing
items.body: There is no natural pitch at the mirror.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after final pickup
items.body: Ask when they try the finished piece on.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after events where fit mattered in photos.
Private feedback helps if pricing felt unclear.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Send after the last dress walks.
Same link for each location when you want one profile.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Tailoring Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
